_meta.purpose: DFT-PBE reference values for elements / properties not present in nist_benchmark.csv. Merged into the references.json output by extract_references.py.
_meta.primary_source: de Jong, Chen, Notestine, Persson, Ceder, Jain, Asta, Gamst (2015). 'Charting the complete elastic properties of inorganic crystalline compounds.' Scientific Data 2, 150009.
_meta.secondary_source: Materials Project elastic dataset (Jain et al. 2013, APL Materials 1, 011002).
_meta.units: elastic constants in GPa, lattice constants in Angstrom
_meta.notes: Values rounded to 1 decimal (Cij) or 3 decimals (a0). PBE typically underestimates elastic constants by 5-10% vs experimental and underestimates lattice constants by 1-3% (overestimates for Pb due to spin-orbit). The classical-potential rows in nist_benchmark.csv use the same DFT-PBE references where overlap exists, so MLIP records produced via this dataset are directly comparable with the existing 559 classical potentials.

Fe._a0_caveat: PBE underestimates ferromagnetic alpha-Fe lattice; experimental is 2.866 A
